description: Allow-list of file path globs for the RavenClaude marketplace. Both .github/workflows/validate-layout.yml and plugins/ravenclaude-core/hooks/enforce-layout.sh read this file. A new file whose path does not match any allowed_globs entry will be blocked by the hook (in Claude Code) and fail the CI workflow (on PRs). Add new globs here when introducing a new top-level directory or a new plugin.

suggestions.Power Platform content inside ravenclaud: Move to plugins/power-platform/ — ravenclaude-core stays domain-neutral.
suggestions.Finance / EdTech / Salesforce content in: Create a new domain plugin under plugins/<domain>/ and add it to .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.
suggestions.New top-level directory: Add the glob to .repo-layout.json allowed_globs first, with rationale in the PR description.
suggestions..ravenclaude/runs/thing/**: Tribunal decision records are an audit substrate — written by thing-decide.py, never by an agent's Write. A tool-shaped write here would forge the decision log.
suggestions..ravenclaude/runs/*/hook-events.jsonl: Guardrail event logs (runaway brake, Heimdall/Vidarr deny history) are an audit substrate — written by the hooks themselves. A tool-shaped write here would reset the brake or forge the deny history.
